## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which project it affects.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the guidelines in the PROJECT_TEMPLATE.md
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have tested this change in my own AWS environment
